name: DropdownAutocomplete
description: Searchable select with type-to-filter input, clear button, chevron, listbox of ListItem rows, and optional label, hint, error, leading icon/avatar. Combobox pattern with keyboard navigation.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Callback when selection changes. Receives undefined when cleared.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message — puts the field in error state.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Leading icon for the trigger (shown when no value selected).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the root element. Layout composition only — do NOT use for custom styling.

props.name: id
props.description: ID for the input element. Auto-generated if not provided.

states.rationale: DropdownAutocomplete trigger hover changes border color only — no background OKLCH shift or overlay on the main surface. Same input-family token-swap pattern as Dropdown.

keyboard.ArrowDown: Open listbox or move highlight down

accessibility.focusManagement: natural tab order; arrow keys within listbox

propertyMapping.note: Visual-only Figma property. In code, states come from CSS pseudo-classes and data attributes (data-error, data-disabled, data-open).
Figma 'type' (text | avatar | icon) controls leading content. In code, leading content is determined by option.icon, option.avatarSrc/avatarInitials, or the leadingIcon prop.
Figma 'text' shows selected item label. In code, resolved from options array by matching value prop. When open, input shows search text instead.
Direct mapping. Default 'Select' in both Figma and code.
Figma boolean. In code, error is a string — truthy = error state + message.
Figma errorText content maps to the React error string prop value.
Figma boolean toggles clear button. In code, clear button shows automatically when a value is selected or search text is entered (not disabled).
Figma boolean toggles chevron. In code, chevron is always rendered.
Figma 'change' is an icon swap slot. In code, mapped to the leadingIcon prop or option.icon.

useWhen: Searchable selection from a list of options
Type-to-filter with icon or avatar option rows
Form fields requiring filtered single-value selection with label and validation
doNotUseFor: Simple select without filtering — use Dropdown
Multi-select — use a dedicated multi-select component
Command palette — use a dedicated command component

knownDeviations.description: Figma uses a single 'dropdown+autocomplete' component set for both Dropdown and DropdownAutocomplete. In code, they are separate components. This manifest covers only DropdownAutocomplete (searchable select).
Figma component does not include label or hint rows. In code, DropdownAutocomplete renders label, trigger, and hint/error as a single component. Label and hint are code-only props.
